offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual matching causes discrepancies in financial records. We simplify the extraction and matching process instead of manual matching of invoices to purchase orders.
problem: Difficulty in matching invoice line items to purchase orders accurately.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users manually enter invoice details and match 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing invoice data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce onboarding steps for new users
